← back to summary

Pauper cards by type

All 1167 Pokémon across the 18 sets, grouped into 615 evolution families. A family appears under every type any of its members takes, so cross-type lines (e.g. a Fire line with a Darkness promo) stay together. Prices are the cheapest Near Mint version across all sets; the badge shows the lowest cutoff each Pokémon qualifies at. Hover a card for a larger image. Generated 2026-07-07 21:48 UTC.

Common / Uncommon — always legal Higher rarity ≤ $1.00 Over $1.00 No Near Mint price
